record.field: {"name": "\u00d4 Insurance Group", "company_type": "private", "logo": "https://logo.clearbit.com/oinsurance.com.br", "sector": [], "sector_primary": false, "industry": false, "industry_group": false, "sub_industry": false, "founded_year": 0, "description": "A \u00d4 buscou a disruptura desde a concep\u00e7\u00e3o de sua marca. A experi\u00eancia do seu time, o conhecimento do mercado mundial e o acesso \u00e0 tecnologia, derrubaram todos os paradigmas do setor para tornar-se palco de um nicho \u00fanico em toda a cadeia de seguros....", "employees": 0.0, "annual_revenue": 0.0, "estimated_annual_revenue": false, "twitter": false, "facebook": "oinsurancegroup", "linkedin": "company/%C3%B4-insurance-group", "crunchbase": false, "tech": ["Microsoft Exchange Online", "Nginx", "Outlook", "Google Analytics", "Facebook Advertiser", "Facebook Connect", "Wordpress", "Google Tag Manager", "Go Squared"], "timezone": "America/Sao Paulo", "timezone_url": "https://time.is/Sao_Paulo", "phone_numbers": [], "email": ["contato@oinsurance.com.br"], "twitter_bio": false, "twitter_followers": 0}
